scripts.db:reset:local: rd /s /q .wrangler\\state 2>nul & echo Local DB wiped. && npm run db:migrate:local
scripts.db:reset:local:unix: rm -rf .wrangler/state && echo 'Local DB wiped.' && npm run db:migrate:local
scripts.db:studio: wrangler d1 execute e-zer0-db --local --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'"
scripts.check: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.security:semgrep: semgrep scan --config p/typescript --config p/javascript --config p/nodejs --config p/owasp-top-ten --metrics=off
scripts.security: npm run security:audit && npm run security:deps && npm run security:secrets && npm run security:semgrep && npm run security:trivy
